---
title: "Kazuya Masuda"
pagetitle: "Kazuya Masuda"
---

I am an Associate Professor of Economics at [Gakushuin University](https://www.gakushuin.ac.jp/univ/eco/) in Tokyo.

My research lies at the intersection of **development economics** and **health economics**, with a particular interest in **economic history** and **intergenerational mobility**. I study how public health policies and institutional reforms shape long-run economic outcomes and the transmission of welfare across generations, primarily in the context of Indonesia and other developing economies.

You can find my research on the [Research](research.qmd) page and a recent [CV](cv.pdf) here.

[Email](mailto:kazuya.masuda@gakushuin.ac.jp)  ·  [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YOUR_ID)  ·  [CV (PDF)](cv.pdf)
